warnings: RECLASSIFIED 2026-07-08: pattern changed from 'notes' (t3) to 'symbol' (t4) per new 13-type taxonomy -- this page is a legend/symbol-definition table for the sanitary discipline, matching the new 'symbol' pattern description exactly ('หน้าสัญลักษณ์/legend'), not a project-level spec/requirement page ('notes'). Content (symbol_entries) is unchanged from t3, only the pattern classification and this flag are new.

Dense 4-column x 11-row legend table with small glyph-based symbols (valve types, cleanout variants, fitting marks). Symbol Thai-text meanings are read with high confidence; the exact graphic glyph for each symbol (left column) is a description aid, not a precise transcribed vector shape.
Independent re-read (t4) agrees with t3's content (same 44 symbol/meaning pairs) after cross-check; no content disagreement, only the pattern label changed.

A few adjacent rows for FD./FCO./AVC. are near-duplicate variants distinguished only by a small graphic difference (e.g. side-outlet vs standard) that is hard to distinguish confidently at this resolution -- flagged for human zoom-review of the glyph column only, not the meaning text.

Field-set for pattern 'symbol' is still draft per schema doc section 1 (no confirmed field-set from real testing yet) -- kept the same field shape as t3's 'notes' version (symbol_entries[]) since it fit the content well and the schema doc does not yet prescribe an alternative shape.
